mirrors.purpose: Desktop and workstation control-plane MCP server
Controller and input mapping MCP runtime
Shared Go package for mapping and profile resolution

consolidated.note: Tmux session and workspace orchestration now lives under dotfiles-mcp. Standalone tmux-mcp repo is retired.
Systemd service and timer management now lives under dotfiles-mcp. Standalone systemd-mcp repo is retired.
Linux process inspection now lives under dotfiles-mcp. Standalone process-mcp repo is retired.
